text.title: sql-optimization Worked Examples
text.summary: One full end-to-end example of sql-optimization applied to a representative input.

section.title: Worked example
section.p: Inputs match the artefacts listed in the AGENTS.md Prerequisites table; the output below conforms to 02-output-contract.xml and would pass scripts/validate-sql-optimization.py.

example.note: The valid example reflects a 96.7% p95 improvement from a single composite index addition.
